issues.source_text: The parties hereby agree to the terms and conditions set forth in this agreement.
issues.target_text: 各方在此同意本协议中规定的条款和条件。
issues.suggestion: 应使用'双方'而非'各方'，因为合同只涉及两方

issues.source_text: Either party may terminate this agreement with 30 days written notice.
issues.target_text: 任何一方可以在30天书面通知后终止本协议。

issues.source_text: Confidential information shall not be disclosed to third parties.
issues.target_text: 机密信息不得向第三方披露。
issues.suggestion: 应使用'保密信息'而非'机密信息'

issues.source_text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect or consequential damages.
issues.target_text: 任何一方均不对间接或后果性损害负责。
issues.suggestion: 应为'间接损失或间接损害'

issues.source_text: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California.
issues.target_text: 本协议应受加利福尼亚州法律管辖。
issues.suggestion: 应为'本协议适用加利福尼亚州法律'
